name: sintra
description: C/C++ code navigation powered by tree-sitter. Built for embedded code where IntelliSense struggles.

cBlitz.include.description: Glob patterns that re-include paths an exclude pattern removed (gitignore-style exceptions). NOT a whitelist: everything is indexed by default, so an include only matters to carve an exception out of an exclude — e.g. exclude '**/linux-src/**' + include '**/linux-src/fs/**' indexes only the fs subtree of an otherwise-excluded folder. Removing an exclude pattern re-admits its files on the next scan.

cBlitz.exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from indexing (build output, third-party, etc.). Applied gitignore-style; a later 'include' pattern can re-admit a subset.

cBlitz.indexing.workerCount.description: Number of parallel worker threads used for the initial/bulk index. Workers are spawned on demand up to this count (an already up-to-date workspace stays near zero). Each worker parses on its own thread and writes to the shared SQLite index (WAL).

cBlitz.indexing.deferQueriesMs.description: How long Go to Definition / symbol search / the Code Insight view wait for an in-flight reindex to finish before proceeding, so results reflect the latest edits. Adds no latency when nothing is indexing. Set to 0 to disable deferral (always query immediately).

cBlitz.indexing.verifyContentHash.description: When a file's modification time changes, re-hash its contents and skip re-parsing if they are byte-identical. Avoids needless re-indexing after operations that bump mtimes without changing content (e.g. git checkout / branch switch), at the cost of reading each changed file on the host. Off by default (modification-time check only).

cBlitz.parse.timeoutMs.description: Per-file tree-sitter parse timeout. Exceeding it falls back to the regex (grep) scanner.

cBlitz.parse.errorRatioThreshold.description: If the share of a file's bytes inside tree-sitter ERROR nodes exceeds this, fall back to the regex (grep) scanner.

cBlitz.parse.maxFileSizeKB.description: Files larger than this (KB) are indexed with the regex (grep) scanner instead of tree-sitter. They are still indexed, not skipped.

cBlitz.db.location.description: Directory for the SQLite index database. Empty = VS Code workspace storage. On Remote-SSH this path is resolved on the remote host. The DB filename is namespaced by a hash of the workspace root.

cBlitz.fuzzy.maxResults.description: Maximum results shown in fuzzy symbol search (F10).

cBlitz.codeInsight.debounceMs.description: Debounce (ms) before the Code Insight view follows the cursor.

cBlitz.codeInsight.hideEmptyCategories.description: Hide a Code Insight category when it has no entries for the symbol under the cursor (e.g. a function with no callers won't show an empty "Called by").

cBlitz.codeInsight.show.symbol.description: Show the "Symbol" summary (the kind, declared type / function signature, storage class, and definition/declaration locations of the symbol under the cursor) in the Code Insight view.

cBlitz.codeInsight.show.type.description: Show the "Type" row (the declared type of the variable/field under the cursor, expandable to that type's definition) in the Code Insight view.

cBlitz.codeInsight.show.definition.description: Show the "Definition" category in the Code Insight view.

cBlitz.codeInsight.show.declaration.description: Show the "Declaration" category in the Code Insight view.

cBlitz.codeInsight.show.calledBy.description: Show the "Called by" category in the Code Insight view.

cBlitz.codeInsight.show.calls.description: Show the "Calls" category in the Code Insight view.

cBlitz.codeInsight.show.references.description: Show the "References" category in the Code Insight view.

scripts.release: npm test && npm run test:unit && npm run test:external && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.vsix')).forEach(f=>fs.rmSync(f))" && vsce package --no-dependencies
